# Iraq Threatens OPEC Exit Over Quota Dispute

*MarketFlock Lead Analyst | June 25, 2026*

---

## 🎯 The Intelligence Signal
Iraq warned it may ultimately considering leaving OPEC unless the group accommodates it with a higher oil production quota, just a few months after the United Arab Emirates quit the group so that it could pump more.
